
=== Properties ===
Minimal Height Limit: 7   

Minimal Height: 24   

Maximum Height: 60   

Maximum Height Limit: 100   

Minimal Radius: 256   

Maximum Radius: 320   

Roughness: 20   

Hills: 10   

Music: Sunrise   

=== Structures ===
====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.16   

Log: Oak Log   

Top: Oak Top   

Height: 1   

Height Variation: 1   

ID: Simple Tree   

leafRadius: 2   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Oak Leaves   

type: Round   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.016   

Block: Soil   

Width: 12   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 2   

smoothness: 0.2   

====Simple Vegetation====
Chance: 0.8   

Block: Grass Vegetation   

Height: 1   

Height Variation: 0   

ID: Simple Vegetation   

[[Category:Land_Biomes]]
